long_tail_signals.Sentence: To investigate a potential link between roseolovirus infection and Alzheimer's disease, Bigley and colleagues used MRV to infect a transgenic mouse model in which overexpression of mutants of the human amyloid precursor protein (APP) and presenilin-1 leads to plaque formation.

long_tail_signals.Sentence: found that abnormal increases in the number of myelinated axons and the thickness of the myelin sheath, and the decrease in myelin basic protein (MBP) expression in 1-month-old 5XFAD mice (co-expressing human APP and presenilin 1 with five familial AD mutations, including APP K670N/M671L + I716V + V717I and PS1 M146L + L286V) was related to spatial memory impairment.

long_tail_signals.Sentence: As insulin resistance can be caused by high-stress hormone levels and since hypercortisolism appears to be an important risk factor of AD, we aimed to investigate the systemic insulin functionality and circulating stress hormone levels in a mutant humanized amyloid precursor protein (APP) overexpressing (hAPP23+/-) AD mouse model.

long_tail_signals.Sentence: This same "guardian angel" analogy may also be applied to the EC of capillary NVU as a functional and structural unit in the brain, since platelet-derived growth factor beta receptor (PDGFR-beta) knockout models in Pcs have demonstrated the abnormal formation of the NVU in adult models with increased permeability due to impaired BBB TJ/AJ development and function and impaired clearance of Abeta.

alteration_evidence.Sentence: All of the responsible mutations identified affect either the genes coding for the amyloid precursor protein (APP) from which Abeta is formed via a multistep processing pathway, or the genes coding for the presenilin (PS) 1 and 2 proteins that function within this processing pathway as part of an enzyme complex responsible for cleaving Abeta from its immediate precursor.

proteostasis/autophagy axis.Sentence: For example, amyloid precursor protein/presenilin 1 (APP/PS1) mice lacking NRF2 exhibited autophagy dysfunction-dependent accumulation of insoluble Abeta aggregates, resulting in an increased pro-inflammatory phenotype.

synaptic and neuronal dysfunction axis.Sentence: TRPC6 overexpression has been shown to rescue mushroom spine loss in presenilin and amyloid precursor protein (APP) knock-in mouse models of AD and also protect neurons from ischemic brain damage.

selected_evidence.Event: ('amyloid precursor protein', 'Gene', '(202, 227)', ('amyloid precursor protein', 'Gene', '351', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('mutants', 'Var', '(181, 188)', ('mutants', 'Mutation', 'point mutations:Mutations', 'point mutations:Mutations')) -- CauseOf -- ('link', 'Reg', '(27, 31)', ('link', 'Reg', '-', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('roseolovirus infection', 'Disease', '(40, 62)', ('roseolovirus infection', 'Disease', 'MESH:D019349', '-'))
selected_evidence.EventDedupKey: gene | point mutations:mutations | mesh:d019349 | amyloid hypothesis
selected_evidence.Sentence: To investigate a potential link between roseolovirus infection and Alzheimer's disease, Bigley and colleagues used MRV to infect a transgenic mouse model in which overexpression of mutants of the human amyloid precursor protein (APP) and presenilin-1 leads to plaque formation.

selected_evidence.Event: ('amyloid precursor protein', 'Gene', '(83, 108)', ('amyloid precursor protein', 'Gene', '351', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('mutations', 'Var', '(23, 32)', ('mutations', 'Mutation', 'point mutations:Mutations', 'point mutations:Mutations')) -- CauseOf -- ('affect', 'Reg', '(44, 50)', ('affect', 'Reg', '-', '-')) -- ThemeOf -- ('PS', 'Disease', '(218, 220)', ('PS', 'Disease', 'MESH:C562429', '-'))
selected_evidence.EventDedupKey: gene | point mutations:mutations | mesh:c562429 | amyloid hypothesis
selected_evidence.Sentence: All of the responsible mutations identified affect either the genes coding for the amyloid precursor protein (APP) from which Abeta is formed via a multistep processing pathway, or the genes coding for the presenilin (PS) 1 and 2 proteins that function within this processing pathway as part of an enzyme complex responsible for cleaving Abeta from its immediate precursor.
